name: Melon
description: ~!Melon is the primary antagonist of Revenge of the Love Failure Arc. He is first introduced as a faux elephant therapist, killing them and using their tusks for ivory to make quick money.!~

name: Najenda
description: Najenda, also known as The Hunk of the Rebellion is the head of the assassin group Night Raid. Taciturn, sharp-minded and level-headed, she leads the group with a surprisingly gentle but firm air. Her years of experience serving in the Empire as a general have made her a highly capable leader. Najenda is sometimes mistaken as a man due to her boyish appearance, even sometimes being nicknamed 'The Hunk of the Rebellion" by her cohorts. She tends to have a habit of telling "cold jokes" and making

name: Riko Saikawa
description: **Relatives**: [Georgie Saikawa](https://anilist.co/character/120978/Georgie-Saikawa) (older sister) Riko Saikawa is [Kanna](https://anilist.co/character/120974/Kanna-Kamui)'s friend and classmate in elementary school. A running gag involves her becoming overwhelmingly flushed with bliss every time she and Kanna make physical contact, along with her shiny forehead. mediaTitles: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: Valentines and Hot Springs! (Please Don't Get Your Hopes Up)

name: Shinobu Sensui
description: Shinobu Sensui was Earth's Spirit Detective before Yusuke Urameshi. According to Koenma, he was the natural choice; he was gifted with amazing spirit awareness, strength, and a strong moral sense of right and wrong. Sensui was very clear-cut and adamant about his moral codes. Humans were victims, so he had to protect them. Demons were evil; he had to kill them. In time he met Itsuki, who asks Sensui give him another day to live first so he can watch the finale of his favourite TV show. Hearing s
mediaTitles: Yu Yu Hakusho: Eizou Hakusho II

name: Shizuka Nanahoshi
description: __Light Novel Volume 9 spoiler__ ~! Nanahoshi Shizuka is a Japanese girl that was saved by [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) in his past life, but instead of reincarnating like Rudeus, she was teleported to Asura Kingdom and was saved by [Orsted](https://anilist.co/character/187382/Orsted). !~

name: Chikara Ennoshita
description: __Team:__ Karasuno High __Height:__ 175.4 cm __Year:__ 2nd year, class 4 __Position:__ Wing Spiker Ennoshita seems quiet and reserved but can behave boldly towards the other 2nd years. He's smart and hasn't received a failing mark before. Similarly to Sugawara, he is always smiling. He's supposedly the only one within the 2nd years to be able to control Tanaka and Nishinoya. He's also able to understand different people, as stated a few times by Tanaka and when he knew what to do to give Yamaguc

name: Haru
description: A stray cat, adopted by Subaru. Her life prior to being adopted was rough; she struggled to feed herself and her siblings, few of whom died. She and Subaru rarely understand each other, but their misunderstandings lead to a common goal. Part of the story is shown from her point of view. She initially believes that her name is a sign for food as that's the name of the girl who once gave her food.

name: Haruichi Kominato
description: A first-year second baseman of the team, Haruichi is a naturally talented, all-rounder baseball player. Despite his small stature and frail appearance, he has pinpoint precision while batting the ball, able to hit it as wide and as far as he pleases, and control where the ball lands. He also is extremely talented at defense, able to catch a ball in the air and throw it while still floating. He is often noted to have amazing baseball sense, able to decide in a split second where to hit the ball,

Ace of the Diamond act II

name: Kakeru Manabe
description: Making his first appearance in Chapter 49 of the manga (Volume 9), Manabe appears at first as a rather lazy, yet outgoing and joyful young man, and has not changed since. Acting as Vice President of Kaibara High School's student council, Kakeru is "second-in-command of the School's Defense Force" and more than passionately works to be one of what he thinks is a Super Sentai type of job, often stating that he's "Black" (as in the black Goranger) while Yuki is "Red" (the leader). name: Natsumi Koshigaya
description: A first-year middle school student and Komari's little sister. An airheaded tomboy who has bad grades.

name: Takayanagi
description: A high school teacher specializing in ethics.
mediaTitles: Koko wa Ima kara Rinri desu.

name: Amu Hinamori
description: **Height:** 157 cm **Guardian Chara:** Ran, Miki, Su, Dia Amu Hinamori, the series protagonist, is a student of Seiyo Elementary. Amu's classmates see her as a "Cool and Spicy" girl, but Amu is actually extremely shy and timid. Part of the reason for this misunderstanding is the trendy punk clothing her mother buys for her as well as the way in which she expresses her shyness and avoids doing new things. However, when Amu wishes for the courage to be reborn as her "would-be self", three colorful

name: Enterprise
description: __Faction:__ Eagle Union __Class:__ Yorktown Legendary Yorktown-class aircraft carrier Enterprise. She has a natural sense of responsibility and values teamwork most of all things. Her "Lucky E" passive in game is a reference to Enterprise's luck and resilience when it came to surviving battles.

name: Entoma Vasilissa Zeta
nativeName: エントマ・ヴァシリッサ・ゼータ
description: One of the members of the battle maids originally created by Genjiro. ~!She has the appearance of a normal girl but her true form is that of an arachanid hybrid. She has bug mask to cover her real face. She uses a leech that recreates human voices after it kills them to disguise her original voice. She has insect focused abilities and uses talismans.!~

name: Hajime Saitou
description: Hajime Saitou is loosely based on the real third-squad captain of the Shinsengumi. During the Meiji era, he lived as a police officer under the name of Gorou Fujita. In the Rurouni Kenshin series, he plays the role of Kenshin's old rival and enemy from the Bakumatsu. He has no compassion or mercy for his enemies and he lives by the Shinsengumi code "Aku Soku Zan (悪即斬)," literally "Slay Evil Immediately," but more poetically rendered as "Swift Death To Evil." His signature technique is the Gatots

name: Javier Asrahan
description: The protagonist of the fantasy novel Iron Blooded Knight, who rises to the level of a sword grandmaster after several years of adventure. Javier Asrahan is a loyal knight of the Frontera family. He currently acts as the personal guard of Lloyd Frontera and accompanies him on nearly every occasion.

name: Riho Tsukishima
description: A second year college student, and the oldest of the main cast. She's a former child actress who was once regarded as a child genius, but her popularity gradually declined as she grew up. Riho is the most calculating and devious of the girls, putting more thought into managing the cafe than the owner, Hayato, himself.

name: Shinichi Akiyama
description: Formerly a graduate student majoring in psychology, he is a "genius swindler" who took down a giant MLM scam named Shuuei to avenge his mother. He helps Nao when he sees the honest nature she had, just like his mother. Although he is not invited into the Liar Game, he enters by substituting for another player in Round II. By Round III he is respected (and feared) enough by the LGT players to become unofficial leader of the Southern Country, though he tries to keep things equal in the group. Yoko

name: Shizuku Hoshikawa
description: __Height:__ 167 cm Shy girl who avoids speaking with others, she's constantly haunted by her past of having bullied a friend. In secret, she wrote a novel expressing her innermost feelings she has never shared with anyone. Although she had planned to erase herself along with her novel when she finished writing, it didn't work out that way because her classmate [Kaori](https://anilist.co/character/204142) borrowed her novel after noticing it by chance. Having read it, Kaori asks when her next nov

name: Tadashi  Kikuchi
description: He is Ainosuke Shindo's secretary and the person who originally taught him to skate.

name: Uvogin
description: Uvogin is the eleventh member of the Phantom Troupe. Nobunaga has compared his personality to Gon's, seeing how not only do they have the same Nen type, but their behavior is similar as well, being impulsive and short tempered. Uvogin is one of the Phantom Troupe that originated from Meteor City. However, like all of the Phantom Troupe, Uvogin doesn't hesitate to kill anyone. Out of all of the Phantom Troupe, Uvogin is the strongest in terms of physical power. Although he prefers to fight alone,

name: Ainosuke Shindou
description: __Zodiac:__ Taurus __Affiliation:__ Diet Member __Relatives:__ 3 Unnamed Aunts; Aiichirou Shindou (father) __Talent:__ Skateboarding He can use an ability called "Love Hug" which allows him to seem like he is riding uphill.

name: Ao Horie
description: A quiet girl who has always kept to herself and studied, that is, until she gets dragged into Kijima's life. Between her perverted ero-artist father and her expectations built up from his publications, she often embarasses herself in front of Kijima. Her life is changing and she doesn't know how to cope in many ways, but she isn't exactly against it happening.
mediaTitles: Midara na Ao-chan wa Benkyou ga Dekinai: Otona-Hen

name: Bepo
description: __Affiliations:__ Heart Pirates __Height:__ 240 cm (7'10") __Bounty:__ ~!500!~ Bepo is a polar bear mink and the navigator of the Heart Pirates under Captain [Trafalgar Law](https://anilist.co/character/13767/Law-Trafalgar). He is the younger brother of the late Nox Pirate Zepo. As the navigator of the Heart Pirates, it can be assumed that Bepo has the knowledge required to navigate the seas.
